SCOPE_NOTE: ALL values below are LIVE-system measurements captured 2026-06-17, NOT from the sealed run. The seal is an offline replay and carries no live latency/CPU/mem. These describe the running stack at observation time.

latency.source: LIVE Prometheus http://localhost:9090 (FastAPI prometheus instrumentation, metric http_request_duration_seconds; cAdvisor for resources)

recommend_endpoint.histogram_bucket: <= 0.005 s (cumulative count 1 from the 0.005 bucket onward)
recommend_endpoint.p50_p95_caveat: Only ONE /recommend call has been recorded since the API last started, so p50 = p95 = the single observation (4.44 ms). histogram_quantile over a [1h] window returns NaN (no traffic in the last hour). This is honest live data on a near-idle system, not a load-test percentile.

attempt_endpoint.reason: Zero requests to any attempt endpoint recorded in Prometheus since API start -> no http_request_duration_seconds series for it. No load was generated (analysis-only). To fill, drive the live recommend->attempt loop and re-query.

overall_hcie_api.note: Aggregated across all hcie-api endpoints over a 5m window; dominated by lightweight dashboard/health GETs.

stored_prior_nfr_measurement_for_context.note: A 2026-05-25 stored 20-iteration micro-benchmark (warm + first-call tail). Useful as a documented prior reading; today's single-call live value (4.44 ms) is consistent with the warm path (min 6.5 ms range).

request_rate.note: Near-idle. 493 requests over ~40 min uptime; rate is dominated by dashboard polling, not learner traffic.

code_quality_sonarqube.source: LIVE SonarQube http://localhost:9000 /api/measures/component (auth admin:admin), project key 'hcie'

technical_debt.sqale_index_human: ~91 hours (1d2h on 8h-day basis is the Sonar effort; raw 5463 min)

coverage_from_sonar.caveat: Sonar reports coverage=0.0 because coverage.xml was NOT ingested on the 2026-06-15 scan (the scan ran without the coverage report path resolving). This is a Sonar-ingestion gap, NOT real zero coverage.

actual_measured_coverage.source: coverage.xml at repo root (mtime 2026-06-15 21:04), generated by scripts/run_coverage.sh
actual_measured_coverage.note: This is the real measured line coverage; use 36.4% (NOT Sonar's 0.0) for the operational NFR.

code_quality_sonarqube.interpretation: Maintainability/Reliability/Security ratings = A; zero bugs, zero vulnerabilities. The one weak rating is Security-Review = E, driven entirely by 87 unreviewed security HOTSPOTS (candidates needing human triage, not confirmed vulns). Duplication low (2.7%), debt ratio 0.3%.

endpoint_reachability.prometheus: reachable (http://localhost:9090) -- up{} returned api, redis, kafka, auto-healer, dlq-worker all = 1
endpoint_reachability.sonarqube: reachable (http://localhost:9000, status UP, v9.9.8) -- measures require basic auth admin:admin
